.metadata-container.background: rgb(245, 239, 234) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(249, 242, 236) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(245, 239, 234) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

blockquote.background: rgb(252, 250, 248) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.background: rgb(245, 239, 234) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(245, 239, 234) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.inline-title.font-family: "??", "??", ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, "Cascadia Mono", "Roboto Mono", "DejaVu Sans Mono", "Liberation Mono", Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, "Source Code Pro", monospace

div.is-active.is-clickable.nav-file-titl.background: rgb(217, 175, 140) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: rgb(191, 121, 64) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(245, 239, 234) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: rgb(191, 121, 64) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(230, 215, 203) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(230, 215, 203) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgb(217, 175, 140) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(245, 239, 234) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(237, 226, 217) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgb(245, 239, 234) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(247, 242, 238) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(247, 242, 238) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(247, 242, 238) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(even).background: rgb(240, 231, 224) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(odd).background: rgb(247, 242, 238) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tr.background: rgb(242, 234, 227) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
